pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"Bad lighting causes fatigue you will blame on your work. This guide covers the principles, the gear, and the exact setup that eliminates eye strain and creates a workspace that energises rather than drains."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. 7:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
8:["$","$L33",null,{"children":["$","$34",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@35"}]}]
9:["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Most people who set up a home office spend hours choosing their desk and chair, then point a single overhead light at their workspace and wonder why they get headaches by 2 PM."}}]
a:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Bad lighting does not just affect how you see your work — it affects how well you can think. Eye strain, headaches, and the fatigue that accumulates over a long workday are frequently caused not by the work itself but by the lighting environment in which it is done."}}]
b:["$","p","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This guide covers the principles, the gear, and the specific setup that eliminates these problems."}}]
c:["$","h2","4",{"id":"the-three-enemies-of-good-workspace-lighting","children":"The Three Enemies of Good Workspace Lighting"}]
d:["$","h3","5",{"id":"1-glare-on-your-screen","children":"1. Glare on Your Screen"}]
e:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Glare occurs when a light source — a window, an overhead light, a bare bulb — is reflected in your monitor. It forces your eyes to work harder to distinguish the content on screen, causing strain that builds over hours."}}]
f:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The fix: <strong>no light source should be visible from your seated position, and no light source should be directly behind your screen or directly in front of you</strong>."}}]
10:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Position your desk perpendicular to windows — the light comes from the side, not from behind or in front."}}]
11:["$","h3","9",{"id":"2-high-contrast-between-screen-and-background","children":"2. High Contrast Between Screen and Background"}]
12:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Staring at a bright screen in a dark room is one of the most common causes of eye strain in home workers. The contrast between the bright screen and the dark surroundings forces your pupils to continuously adjust."}}]
13:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The principle: <strong>your screen brightness should roughly match your ambient environment brightness</strong>. If you work in a dark room, either increase your ambient light or reduce your screen brightness. Never let them diverge significantly."}}]
14:["$","h3","12",{"id":"3-flickering-and-poor-colour-rendering","children":"3. Flickering and Poor Colour Rendering"}]
15:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Cheap LED bulbs flicker at frequencies that are imperceptible consciously but detectable by the visual system. The result is fatigue and headaches that appear to have no cause."}}]
16:["$","p","14",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Look for bulbs with a CRI (Colour Rendering Index) of 90 or above. High-CRI bulbs render colours accurately and feel significantly more natural than low-CRI alternatives."}}]
17:["$","h2","15",{"id":"the-ideal-lighting-setup","children":"The Ideal Lighting Setup"}]
18:["$","h3","16",{"id":"natural-light","children":"Natural Light"}]
19:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Natural light is your primary resource. It has the highest CRI possible, follows a daily cycle that supports circadian rhythms, and is free."}}]
1a:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Position your desk so windows are to your left or right — not directly behind or in front of your monitor. Use sheer curtains or blinds to diffuse direct sunlight, which creates harsh shadows and screen glare."}}]
1b:["$","h3","19",{"id":"ambient-light","children":"Ambient Light"}]
1c:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Ambient light fills the room and reduces the contrast between your screen and its surroundings. Options:"}}]
1d:["$","ul","21",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Ceiling fixtures with high-CRI bulbs</strong> (3000–4000K for daytime work)"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Floor lamps with indirect lighting</strong> — pointing upward to bounce off the ceiling creates very even, shadow-free light"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>LED light strips behind your monitor</strong> — bias lighting placed behind your screen reduces eye strain by narrowing the contrast ratio"}}]]}]
1e:["$","h3","22",{"id":"task-light","children":"Task Light"}]
1f:["$","p","23",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A dedicated desk lamp provides focused light for reading documents, taking notes, or any task away from the screen."}}]
20:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Key features to look for:"}}]
21:["$","ul","25",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Adjustable colour temperature (2700K warm through 6000K cool)"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Adjustable brightness"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Arm that positions light to the side, not directly overhead"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"CRI 90+"}}]]}]
22:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Recommended</strong>: BenQ ScreenBar Pro (clips to monitor, sensor-adjusted brightness), Elgato Key Light (excellent for video calls), or a simple Anglepoise-style lamp with a Philips Hue bulb for adjustable colour temperature."}}]
23:["$","h2","27",{"id":"colour-temperature-explained","children":"Colour Temperature Explained"}]
24:["$","p","28",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Colour temperature (measured in Kelvin) describes how warm or cool a light appears:"}}]
25:["$","ul","29",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>2700–3000K (warm white)</strong>: Evening-appropriate, relaxing. Not ideal for focused work."}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>3500–4000K (neutral white)</strong>: The sweet spot for most daytime office work — natural, not harsh."}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>5000–6500K (cool daylight)</strong>: High alertness, good for early morning or detailed work. Harsh for extended periods."}}]]}]
26:["$","p","30",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The practical recommendation: use 4000K as your default. Drop to 3000K after 6 PM to support your natural wind-down."}}]
27:["$","h2","31",{"id":"the-video-call-problem","children":"The Video Call Problem"}]
28:["$","p","32",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Poor lighting in video calls creates a professional problem: you appear poorly lit, low-contrast, and often exhausted — regardless of how you actually feel."}}]
29:["$","p","33",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The solution is a key light: a soft light source positioned in front of and slightly above your face. It does not need to be expensive."}}]
2a:["$","p","34",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Budget fix</strong>: Move a floor lamp to face you during calls, with a warm-white bulb."}}]
2b:["$","p","35",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Proper fix</strong>: Elgato Key Light (~£130) or the smaller Key Light Mini (~£80) — both clip to a monitor or mount on a stand, provide adjustable colour temperature and brightness, and transform how you appear on camera."}}]
2c:["$","h2","36",{"id":"the-setup-checklist","children":"The Setup Checklist"}]
2d:["$","ul","37",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Desk positioned perpendicular to windows"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Overhead or ambient light at 3500–4000K, CRI 90+"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Bias light behind your monitor"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Task lamp to the left or right of your monitor (never directly above)"}}],["$","li","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Screen brightness matching ambient light level"}}],["$","li","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Cool light during focus hours; warm light in the evening"}}]]}]
2e:["$","p","38",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"For the ergonomics side of your lighting decisions, see our <a href=\"/blog/ergonomic-home-office-setup-guide\" class=\"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline font-medium\">ergonomic home office setup guide</a>."}}]
2f:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Workspace","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Workspace"}],[["$","$L3","lighting",{"href":"/blog/tag/lighting","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","lighting"]}],["$","$L3","home-office",{"href":"/blog/tag/home-office","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","home-office"]}],["$","$L3","eye-strain",{"href":"/blog/tag/eye-strain","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","eye-strain"]}],["$","$L3","setup-guide",{"href":"/blog/tag/setup-guide","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","setup-guide"]}],["$","$L3","ergonomics",{"href":"/blog/tag/ergonomics","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","ergonomics"]}]]]}]
30:["$","$L36",null,{"title":"Home Office Lighting Guide: How to Light Your Workspace for Focus and Comfort","slug":"home-office-lighting-guide"}]
31:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L37",null,{}]}]
32:["$","aside",null,{"className":"space-y-5 print:hidden","children":[["$","$L38",null,{"items":[{"id":"why-lighting-is-the-most-underrated-element-of-a-home-office","text":"Why Lighting is the Most Underrated Element of a Home Office","level":2},{"id":"the-three-enemies-of-good-workspace-lighting","text":"The Three Enemies of Good Workspace Lighting","level":2},{"id":"1-glare-on-your-screen","text":"1. Glare on Your Screen","level":3},{"id":"2-high-contrast-between-screen-and-background","text":"2. High Contrast Between Screen and Background","level":3},{"id":"3-flickering-and-poor-colour-rendering","text":"3.
